channel.title: Van-Life on Budget Van Life Affiliate Guide
channel.description: Recent content in Van-Life on Budget Van Life Affiliate Guide

item.title: Dometic Portable Toilet Review: Compact Emergency Van Setup
item.description:
Dometic Portable Toilet Review: Compact Emergency Van Setup
#

I lived full-time in a 2017 Dodge ProMaster 2500 for seven years, and bathroom planning is one of the most under-discussed realities of van life. You can absolutely live without a built-in bathroom, but having a compact emergency option changes your stress level in a big way. This review covers a Dometic portable toilet approach focused on practical emergency readiness, not glamorized “luxury van” marketing.
